name: iCIMS API
description: The iCIMS Talent Cloud API provides programmatic access to iCIMS recruiting and talent acquisition platform resources including people (candidates/employees), jobs, applicant workflows (applications), users, folders, and assessments. It supports searching, creating, and updating records across the iCIMS system.
